resources.string: Free consultation and custom fitting are required with an optician at selected Lenskart showrooms.
Lenskart is working hard to expand pickup points across the country. We are coming soon to your locality.
We'll be unable to provide service to floors located on the 4th floor and higher if there is no elevator available.
Keep your face aligned & capture a picture to find your Pupillary Distance (PD)
Check your email - A link to reset password has been sent to your email
